basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Chandigarh Project Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University Chandigarh has released the official Project Scientist I Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Panjab University Chandigarh Project Scientist I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a maximum age of 35 years and a Ph.D. in Science or a Master’s degree in Engineering/Technology along with the prescribed research and development experience can apply offline on or before 24-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph. D in the field of Science OR Master’s degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university
qualification.details: Ph. D in the field of Science OR Master’s degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university. Experience (One year after Ph.D and Two year after M.Tech/ME) in research and development in Industrial or Academic institutions or Science and Technology organizations. Experience in scientific activities and services with proven knowledge of Intellectual Property Rights, STI Policies & Industry Academia networks for R&D.

salary_details.details: Rs. 56,000/- + HRA as applicable Per Month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://cpr.puchd.ac.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Chandigarh Project Scientist I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Panjab University Chandigarh Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Panjab University Chandigarh Project Scientist I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Chandigarh Project Scientist I Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ph. D in the field of Science OR Master’s degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university. Experience (One year after Ph.D and Two year after M.Tech/ME) in research and development in Industrial or Academic institutions or Science and Technology organizations. Experience in scientific activities and services with proven knowledge of Intellectual Property Rights, STI Policies & Industry Academia networks for R&D.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 56,000/- + HRA as applicable Per Month

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Chandigarh Project Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for submission of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://cpr.puchd.ac.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Chandigarh Project Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Scientist I position at Panjab University Chandigarh?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application form for the Project Scientist I post is 24th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Scientist I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Science or a Master's degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university, along with relevant research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Scientist I position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 56,000/- plus applicable House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Scientist I recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, and submit it via Speed Post or Registered Post to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Scientist I position?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What kind of experience is required for this role?
faq.answer: One year of experience after Ph.D. or two years of experience after M.Tech/ME in research and development is required. Additionally, experience in scientific activities and services with knowledge of Intellectual Property Rights, STI Policies, and Industry Academia networks is necessary.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Panjab University Chandigarh, which is https://cpr.puchd.ac.in/.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at Panjab University Chandigarh.
